~ ★ ~ Hi everyone!!! Heh, I guess I shouldn't say sorry for being late, since I'm coming back anyway (and I'm always late for the schedule I made up lol) Anyway, this bot just came to my mind out of the blue, so hehe, I hope you like it more than the last one... Although I tried equally hard on them :( I'm trying to write the first message more than usual and I hope you like it.
